canonical_definition: The capacity of a multi-agent system to handle internal errors from faulty agents and maintain overall operational performance without significant degradation.
papers: On the Resilience of LLM-Based Multi-Agent Collaboration with Faulty Agents
Position: AI Safety Must Embrace an Antifragile Perspective
